name: Global List Integration
description: Mod adds some features from demonlist.org

load-only-on-demonlist.name: Load only on Demonlist
load-only-on-demonlist.description: The level placement won't be loaded or displayed unless you're on the Demonlist screen. On a level page, it will only be shown if you navigated to the level from the Demonlist.

increase-levels-per-page.name: Increase levels per page
increase-levels-per-page.description: Increases the number of levels on one page in the demonlist from 10 to 25.
